utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- travel_dates: Provided with specific dates (October 15-19, 2024) — fully specified.
- transportation: Should include flight details with costs. Provided: 'flights: Included in €875 package' and 'cost: Estimated €200'. This is inconsistent and lacks actual flight details (airline, routes, times). Not fully specified.
- accommodation: Should be hotel selection with costs. Provided: name 'Adventure Lodge' and cost €275 (€55 per night). No address or booking details required by the format, so this meets 'hotel selection with costs' — fully specified.
- activities: Should be selected activities with costs. Provided three activities each with a name and cost — fully specified.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided local transportation €60 and meals €130 — fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown required. Provided only as '€875' without an itemized breakdown summing all components; also conflicts with transportation note. Not a complete cost breakdown — not fully specified.
Thus, fully specified items are: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services. Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified.
